_instructions:
Translate every value below into the target language. Keep HTML tags (,
, ) exactly as-is. Do not change the keys.

r1.hs: Expert officers trained for startups - led by you
r1.alt: Generic AI tools with no domain focus

r2.hs: Builds, codes, manages, mentors - all at once

r3.hs: Prepares you to lead a real human team
r3.alt: Tries to permanently replace your team

r4.hs: Gets smarter with every project on the platform
r4.alt: Starts from zero with every new session

r5.hs: Your project is fully confidential - always
r5.alt: Unclear data policies and IP ownership

r6.hs: Available 24/7, zero ego, never burns out
r6.alt: Co-founders with schedules, moods, and equity demands

r7.hs: A clear roadmap: from idea to company
r7.alt: No direction, no milestones, no sense of progress

r8.hs: Guides you to balance ambition, life, and wellbeing
r8.alt: Hustle culture with no regard for the human behind the startup

moat.p: Every entrepreneur who works with HypeShow doesn't just receive value - they create it. Every decision, every sprint, every lesson learned makes our executives more capable for your next day, your next sprint - and more adaptable for you and for the whole community.
moat.quote: "A competitor can copy our prompt. They cannot copy the accumulated experience of thousands of real startup decisions."

pricing.noteP:
Every executive is equally trained and equally committed - regardless of your plan.
Pricing reflects how much you use them, not how good they are. Every founder gets the same expert team.

about.p1: The best startups don't succeed because of one brilliant person. They succeed because of a team that challenges, supports, and executes together. Until now, that team was only available to founders with the right connections or enough capital.
about.p2: HypeShow changes that. We're not here to replace human teams - we're here to bridge the gap between "I have an idea" and "I have a company." When you're ready to hire your first engineers, designers, and operators, you'll already know how to lead them - because you've been doing it with us.
about.p3: Our goal: get every entrepreneur at least to revenue or investment-ready, with the skills, habits, and leadership confidence to build something that lasts and does good in the world.
about.stat1: Specialized AI officers, each with a defined domain and growing expertise
about.stat2: Things happening simultaneously: building, learning, and preparing to lead humans
about.stat3: Your team is fully operational the moment you join - no setup, no delay
about.stat4: Jobs replaced. HypeShow bridges you to a real human team - not away from one.
